scenario.name: Callee sends anchored early media
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=early-[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:1002@127.0.0.1:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 3 3 IN IP4 [media_ip] s=SIPp c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=early-[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:1002@127.0.0.1:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 3 3 IN IP4 [media_ip] s=SIPp c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv
